nasb.text: Now therefore, let your hands be strong and be valiant; for Saul your lord is dead, and also the house of Judah has anointed me king over them.”

esv.text: Now therefore let your hands be strong, and be valiant, for Saul your lord is dead, and the house of Judah has anointed me king over them.”

cnv.text: 現在你們要堅強，要作勇敢的人，因為你們的主掃羅已經死了；猶大家已經膏立了我作他們的王了。”

ccb.text: 现在你们的主扫罗已经死了，犹大支派已经膏立我做他们的王，你们要刚强勇敢。”
